name: 2025 - 26 Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp - NETT Non-Resident Rates

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6)
texts.text: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents
texts.text: Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.
texts.text: All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All quoted rates are NETT and are non-commissionable.
texts.text: All quoted rates are NETT and are non-commissionable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All EXTRA services are quoted on NETT basis.
texts.text: All EXTRA services are quoted on NETT basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.
texts.text: Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.
texts.text: Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Single Room policy -We allow a maximum of TWO Single rooms per booking.
texts.text: Single Room policy -We allow a maximum of TWO Single rooms per booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child rate is applicable for children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.
texts.text: Child rate is applicable for children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).
texts.text: Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children staying in own room pay 75% of the room rate.
texts.text: Children staying in own room pay 75% of the room rate.

table_cells.text: CONFIRMATIONANDCANCELLATIONPOLICY • Block bookingsMUSTbeconfirmed at least 60days in peak season and 30 days before arrival for the rest of year. • Anon-refundable 30%deposit of the total invoice is required uponconfirmation of the booking. • 100%payment of the total Invoice is required 45 days prior to the date of arrival for all the seasons. • Cancelation 61+ days, prior to arrival - no cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 46-60 days, prior to arrival - 25%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 22-45 days, prior to arrival - 50%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 72 hrs - 21days, prior to arrival - 75%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation less than 72hours, orno-show - 100%cancellation fee charged.

CONTRACTTERMSANDCONDITIONS • Thisagreement is valid for the year 2025, and must be renewed annually. • These rates are confidential and cannotbemade available to any3 rd party through internet sites, e-mail, or any form ofpublishing. • Atour leader of a group pays 50%ofthecontracted rates. • Travel Agentspay 30%ofthecontracted rates, unless invited, or agreed with the Management of Tulia Amboseli SafariCamp - NOTavailable during Peak Season . • Checkinon arrival date is from12 pm(noon), • Check-out is at 10:00 am. • Should the government alter rates, thecamp reserves the right to negotiate the rates with contracted agents. • Thehotel reserves the right of admission, and the rooms are subject to availability. • Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner and walking safari are weather- permitting. • Tulia Amboseli Safari Campdoes NOT allow pets in, or on the premises.
